Peition For Order Regarding Accountings And Bond; Modifying Irrevocable Trust; And Fixing And Allowing Attorney Fees And Costs Prob Code 15409,17200
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jessica Jones, Esq., for Debra Dolch, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court confirms with counsel that she is submitting on the papers. Counsel confirms with the court that the date of the accounting shall be from the date of the court's order regarding the subject matter. The court confirms that it will be setting bond in the amount of $40,000. Additionally, the following status dates are set in open court: Sep-23-2025 for filing of bond and for the filing of the fully executed trust instrument; and, Oct-21-2026 for the filing of a first accounting.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nguyen. Not Reported.
